title: Define and enforce the TypeLift-lineage 2026 fork standard
description: Operator decision from 2026-05-28: TypeLift-lineage packages should be forked or reimplemented into the current substrate toolchain when the idea remains load-bearing. This bead defines the common gate for Phase C of typelift-substrate-modernization: Swift tools 6.3, strict concurrency / Sendable discipline, Swift Testing primary integration, deterministic randomized replay, law definitions independent from their test runner, named APIs over operator-only APIs, substrate-typed shrinkers, and explicit license provenance before copied code enters a substrate-owned fork. Maintainer copies stay provenance-only; product code depends on substrate-owned forks under the correct collective.
